title: Intercity S3
description: This is the official modpack used on Intercity S3!
body:
## INTERCITY S3 MODPACK

This is the official modpack used on the Intercity server.

Intercity is a urban-themed server based on MTR Mod, we pride ourselves on having high quality builds and high quality public transport.

This modpack includes both the mods and the resource packs used on the server.

## CREDITS

External links for non-modrinth mods:
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/furnish
